positive: A stylized, high-contrast illustration of an astronaut floating within a field of bioluminescent tropical flora. The astronaut, depicted in a sleek, minimalist spacesuit silhouette, is positioned centrally, looking towards a nebula-infused portal. The flora should feature neon pink, electric blue, and jade green tones, creating a vibrant contrast against the deep blacks and cosmic violets of space. The style is graphic novel meets retro-futurism, with crisp lines, bold flat color blocks, and strong depth perception. Emphasize clean negative space around the figure. High resolution, apparel graphic design, suitable for screen printing.
